summary: SSR meta handler for /drummers/<slug>/licks/<lick-slug> emits full @graph JSON-LD with HowTo, VideoObject (primary + tutorial), MusicRecording, and BreadcrumbList. 63 insertions in api/meta/[...path].js.
title: SEO batch: Lick pages — HowTo + VideoObject + MusicRecording JSON-LD is client-side only, invisible to crawlers (~157 pages)
